name: Muzero Acquisition Corp
business: Muzero Acquisition Corp is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a Business Combination with one or more businesses or entities. It has generated no operating revenues to date and has not selected any specific Business Combination target. The company is initially focused on target businesses that are technology-enabled across any industry.

exposures.sentence: As part of our exploration of opportunities for a Business Combination in technology-driven fields, we intend to investigate potentially appropriate targets in the artificial intelligence (AI) sector.
